introSection: Wildcat's Revenge is a steel hybrid roller coaster at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride replaced and reused components of Wildcat, which operated from 1996 through its closure in 2022.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The attraction was announced in November 2022.

The train was revealed at the 2022 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Wildcat's Revenge opened to the public on June 2, 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wildcat's Revenge has separate areas for loading and unloading.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each restraint includes an additional handle for rider comfort. The lasso-like component was developed in conjunction between Rocky Mountain Construction and Hersheypark, but it has since been removed from every train.

fullText:
Wildcat's Revenge is a steel hybrid roller coaster at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride replaced and reused components of Wildcat, which operated from 1996 through its closure in 2022.

The attraction was announced in November 2022.

The train was revealed at the 2022 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Wildcat's Revenge opened to the public on June 2, 2023.

Wildcat's Revenge has separate areas for loading and unloading.

Each restraint includes an additional handle for rider comfort. The lasso-like component was developed in conjunction between Rocky Mountain Construction and Hersheypark, but it has since been removed from every train.
